query_title: Jerry Seinfeld: I'm Telling You for the Last Time

recommendations.title: Best Sellers
recommendations.overview: A cranky, retired author reluctantly embarks on a final book tour to help out a young publisher.

recommendations.title: Loving Vincent
recommendations.overview: A young man arrives at the last hometown of painter Vincent van Gogh to deliver the troubled artist's final letter and ends up investigating his final days there.

recommendations.title: His Three Daughters
recommendations.overview: Emotions run high when three estranged sisters reunite in a cramped New York City apartment to watch over their ailing father during his final days.

recommendations.title: The Bad Education Movie
recommendations.overview: Mr Wickers and his class go on one final school trip after they finish their GCSEs.

recommendations.title: Jerry Seinfeld: 23 Hours to Kill
recommendations.overview: Jerry Seinfeld takes the stage in New York and tackles talking vs. texting, bad buffets vs. so-called "great" restaurants and the magic of Pop Tarts.

recommendations.title: Annie Hall
recommendations.overview: New York comedian Alvy Singer falls in love with the ditsy Annie Hall.

recommendations.title: Franco Escamilla: por la anécdota

recommendations.title: Asphalt Burning
recommendations.overview: The third and final instalment in the Burnout trilogy. This time, the road leads through Norway, to Sweden, Denmark and finally Germany to race on the famous racing track, Nürburgring.

recommendations.title: K-ON! The Movie

recommendations.title: Synecdoche, New York
recommendations.overview: A theater director struggles with his work, and the women in his life, as he attempts to create a life-size replica of New York inside a warehouse as part of his new play.
